channel.title: GitHub Pascal Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Pascal in GitHub

item.title: cheat-engine/cheat-engine
item.description: Cheat Engine. A development environment focused on modding

item.title: HeidiSQL/HeidiSQL
item.description: A lightweight client for managing MariaDB, MySQL, SQL Server, PostgreSQL, SQLite, Interbase and Firebird, written in Delphi and Lazarus/FreePascal

item.title: jrsoftware/issrc
item.description: Inno Setup is an open-source installation builder for Windows applications by Jordan Russell and Martijn Laan. Since its introduction in 1997, Inno Setup has been trusted by developers and organizations of all sizes to reliably deploy software to millions of PCs worldwide.

item.title: benjamimgois/goverlay
item.description: Goverlay is an easy graphical interface to configure MangoHud, vkBasalt, and OptiScaler

item.title: transmission-remote-gui/transgui
item.description: 🧲 A feature rich cross platform Transmission BitTorrent client. Faster and has more functionality than the built-in web GUI.

item.title: UltraStar-Deluxe/USDX
item.description: The free and open source karaoke singing game UltraStar Deluxe, inspired by Sony SingStar™

item.title: exercism/windows-installer
item.description: A project to download and install the latest version of Exercism Client for Windows depending on the architecture.
